home.subtitle: Your school’s platform to study, practise and follow your progress.
home.studentInviteNote: Students can only join the platform via an invitation from their teacher.

auth.passwordHint: Min. 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number, one special character

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Enter your credentials.
login.studentInviteNote: Students receive an email invitation from their teacher.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Sign up to start your learning journey.
register.successText: We sent you a verification email. Open the link in the message to activate your account, then you can log in.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email: we'll send you a link to reset it.
forgot.successText: If the email address you entered is registered, you will shortly receive instructions to reset your password.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new secure password.
reset.missingToken: Invalid link: the reset token is missing. Request a new link from the 'Forgot password' page.
reset.successText: Your password has been reset successfully. Please log in again with your new credentials.

verifyEmail.successText: Your account is now active. You can log in.
verifyEmail.failNoToken: The link does not contain a valid token.
verifyEmail.failGeneric: The verification link is invalid or has expired. Try registering again or contact support.

verifyEmailChange.successText: Your new email address has been confirmed successfully. You can use it to log in from now on.
verifyEmailChange.invalidText: The link does not contain any security token. Go back to your profile and request a new email change.
verifyEmailChange.failExpired: The confirmation link has expired. Go back to your profile and request a new email change.
verifyEmailChange.failEmailTaken: This email address is now associated with another account.
verifyEmailChange.failGeneric: The token is invalid or has already been used. Request a new email change from your profile.

resend.done: If the address is registered and not yet verified, you'll receive a new verification email shortly.

invite.noTokenText: To register you need a valid invitation link. Students receive their invitation from their teacher.
invite.successText: Your account has been created. You can now sign in.
invite.studentSubtitle: Enter your details to activate your student account.
invite.teacherSubtitle: Enter your details to activate your teacher account.

teacherRequest.title: Teacher application
teacherRequest.subtitle: Submit your application: an administrator will review it before enabling access.
teacherRequest.motivazioneHint: Add a short introduction for the administrator.
teacherRequest.successText: Your application is pending approval. You will receive an email once an administrator has reviewed it.

dashboard.subtitle: Here is an overview of your account on the platform.
dashboard.teacherCardText: View the list of students, change roles and manage the accounts registered on the platform.
dashboard.quizCardText: Practise hiragana and katakana with a spaced-repetition quiz: the characters you miss come back more often. Earn XP, levels and streaks.
dashboard.scuoleCardText: Create and configure the platform schools and their personal settings.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information and preferences.
profile.languageDescription: Determines the interface language and the one used in the automated emails sent by the platform.
profile.changeEmailDescription: You will receive a confirmation email at the new address. The change will only take effect after you click the confirmation link.
profile.changeEmailSuccess: Confirmation email sent to <0>{{email}}</0>. Check your new inbox.
profile.deleteDescription: This action is permanent. All your data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
profile.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure? This operation cannot be undone.
profile.badgesDescription: The milestones you have reached by studying, writing and keeping your streak alive.

users.managementSubtitle: View, filter and manage the accounts registered on the platform.

filters.searchLabel: Search by first or last name

table.emptyFilteredDescription: Try changing or resetting the search filters.
table.emptyAllDescription: When students register, they will appear here.

row.confirmDescription: The account of {{name}} ({{email}}) will be permanently deleted. This operation cannot be undone.

status.notFoundText: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
status.forbiddenText: You do not have the necessary permissions to view this page.
status.featureDisabledText: Your school has not enabled the "{{sezione}}" section. If you think this is a mistake, talk to a teacher.

lockout.title: Account temporarily locked due to too many attempts.

errors.network: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.loadFailed: Could not load the data. Please try again.

codes.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Your email has not been verified yet. Check your inbox for the confirmation link.
codes.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Account temporarily locked due to too many attempts. Please try again later.
codes.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
codes.INVALID_TOKEN: Invalid session. Please log in again.
codes.NO_REFRESH_TOKEN: Session expired. Please log in again.
codes.REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please log in again.
codes.INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Invalid session. Please log in again.
codes.FORBIDDEN: You do not have the necessary permissions for this operation.
codes.CSRF_TOKEN_INVALID: Invalid session. Reload the page and try again.
codes.DUPLICATE_VALUE: This email address is already registered. Please choose another one.
codes.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please try again in a few minutes.
codes.TOO_MANY_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS: Too many login attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.
codes.EMAIL_TAKEN: This email is already associated with another account.
codes.EXPIRED_TOKEN: The token has expired. Please request a new operation.
codes.LAST_TEACHER: Cannot delete or demote the last teacher.
codes.SELF_ROLE_CHANGE_FORBIDDEN: You cannot change your own role.
codes.SELF_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You cannot delete your account from this section. Use the profile settings.
codes.ACCOUNT_PENDING: Your account is pending approval by an administrator.
codes.ACCOUNT_NOT_ACTIVE: This account is not allowed to sign in. Please contact an administrator.
codes.INVITE_EXPIRED: Invitation expired. Please request a new one.
codes.INVITE_ALREADY_USED: This invitation has already been used.
codes.INVITE_ROLE_MISMATCH: This invitation is not valid for this type of registration.
codes.INVITE_NOT_PENDING: Only pending invitations can be revoked.
codes.EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED: An account is already registered with this email.
codes.ADMIN_ROLE_FORBIDDEN: This operation is reserved for administrators.
codes.LAST_ADMIN: You cannot delete or demote the last administrator.
codes.EMPTY_TRAINING_POOL: No problem characters yet — play a few quizzes first.
codes.ALREADY_MEMBER: The user is already a member of this classroom.
codes.INVALID_MEMBER_ROLE: The specified user does not have the required role.
codes.USER_NOT_ACTIVE: The specified user is not active.
codes.ALREADY_ASSIGNED: This recipient is already assigned to the task.
codes.INVALID_ASSIGNMENT_TARGET: Specify exactly one between classroom and student.
codes.DELIVERY_NOT_FOUND: The student has not submitted this assignment yet.
codes.SCORE_OUT_OF_RANGE: The score cannot exceed the assignment maximum.
codes.REPLIES_DISABLED: Replies are not allowed for this message.
codes.NO_RECIPIENT: The reply recipient is no longer available.
codes.INVALID_MESSAGE_TARGET: Specify exactly one between classroom and student.
codes.CROSS_SCUOLA_FORBIDDEN: This resource does not belong to your school.
codes.SCUOLA_NAME_TAKEN: A school with this name already exists.
codes.SCUOLA_HAS_USERS: Cannot delete the school: it still has linked users.
codes.NO_SCUOLA: Your account is not associated with any school.
codes.ALREADY_AVAILABLE: The course is already available for this classroom.
codes.AVAILABILITY_NOT_FOUND: The course is not available for this classroom.
codes.TOO_MANY_CAPITOLI: Too many chapters at creation: add the remaining ones individually.
codes.NO_FILE: No file uploaded. Select a file and try again.
codes.FILE_TOO_LARGE: The file exceeds the maximum allowed size.
codes.UNEXPECTED_FILE_FIELD: Unexpected file field in the request.
codes.UPLOAD_ERROR: Something went wrong while uploading the file. Please try again.
codes.VIDEO_NOT_FOUND: This chapter has no uploaded video.
codes.COPERTINA_NOT_FOUND: This course has no uploaded cover image.
codes.SOTTOCAPITOLO_DEPTH_EXCEEDED: A sub-chapter cannot contain further sub-chapters.
codes.CAPITOLO_PADRE_INVALID: A chapter cannot be its own parent.
codes.CAPITOLO_HAS_CHILDREN: This chapter has sub-chapters and cannot itself become a sub-chapter.
codes.ENABLEMENT_NOT_FOUND: The quiz is not enabled for this classroom.
codes.ALREADY_ENABLED: The quiz is already enabled for this classroom.
codes.QUIZ_TEMPLATE_NON_ABILITATO: Your school disabled free practice: play the assigned quizzes.
codes.QUIZ_TEMPLATE_IMMUTABILE: A quiz template cannot be changed.
codes.QUIZ_CONFIG_NON_AMMESSA: This configuration is not allowed by the template.
codes.QUIZ_TEMPLATE_NO_DOMANDE: A template quiz cannot have hand-written questions.
codes.TROPPE_DOMANDE: The quiz reached the maximum number of questions.
codes.DOMANDA_OPZIONI_NON_AMMESSE: A short-answer question cannot have options.
codes.DOMANDA_VERO_FALSO_INCOMPLETA: A true/false question must have exactly 2 options.
codes.DOMANDA_OPZIONI_MANCANTI: Options are required for this question type.
codes.DOMANDA_UNICA_CORRETTA: There must be exactly one correct option.
codes.EMPTY_QUIZ_POOL: No question available with these filters.
codes.FEATURE_DISABLED: This section is not active for your school.
codes.SCUOLA_SOSPESA: Your school is temporarily suspended. Contact a teacher.
codes.SLUG_REQUIRED: Provide a public identifier (slug) for the school.
codes.SLUG_CONFLICT: A school with this public identifier already exists.
codes.INVALID_ACTIVITY_TYPE: The activity type is not valid.

validation.nomeLength: First name must be between 2 and 100 characters
validation.cognomeLength: Last name must be between 2 and 100 characters
validation.etaInt: Age must be an integer between 14 and 99
validation.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number and one special character
validation.scuolaInvalid: The school identifier is not valid

invites.managementSubtitle: Invite new students and keep track of the invitations you have sent.

create.studentText: Enter the student's email and assign a class: they will receive a link to complete registration.
create.teacherText: Enter the teacher's email: they will receive a link to complete registration, with no approval needed.

list.title: Sent invitations
list.confirmDescription: The link sent to {{email}} will no longer be usable.
list.emptyDescription: The invitations you send will appear here.

quiz.pageSubtitle: Recognise hiragana and katakana and type their romanisation. Your progress is saved: the trickiest characters will come back more often.

stats.toReviewEmpty: No weak characters right now. Great job!

setup.title: Set up the session
setup.subtitle: Choose what to practise. Up to 20 characters will be drawn.
setup.rowsAllHint: No row selected: all rows will be included.
setup.rowsSomeHint: Only the selected rows will be included.
setup.includeDakuon: Include dakuon and handakuon (が, ぱ…)
setup.timerModeHint: You have a few seconds per character, but earn more XP.
setup.domainLegend: What do you want to study?
setup.quizSubtitle: Quiz assigned by your school. Some settings may already be fixed.

results.title: Session complete
results.levelUp: You went from level {{from}} to level {{to}}!

audio.noVoice: No Japanese voice available on this device
audio.unsupported: Speech synthesis is not supported by your browser

writing.title: On-screen writing
writing.hint: Draw the character with your finger or mouse, following the stroke order.
writing.retryStroke: Stroke not recognized: try again following the guide.

practice.kanjiEmptyDescription: Stroke order for level {{level}} isn't included yet. It's currently available for N5.

gamification.title: Your progress
gamification.streakHint: Keep it up: come back tomorrow to keep the flame alive.
gamification.streakHintEmpty: Complete a quiz today to light up your streak.

STREAK_3.name: First sparks
STREAK_3.description: Study for 3 days in a row.

PERFEZIONISTA.name: Perfectionist
PERFEZIONISTA.description: Complete a quiz with 100% correct answers.

MAESTRO_HIRAGANA.name: Hiragana Master
MAESTRO_HIRAGANA.description: Bring every hiragana to the maximum SRS score.

MAESTRO_KATAKANA.name: Katakana Master
MAESTRO_KATAKANA.description: Bring every katakana to the maximum SRS score.

PRIMI_TRATTI.name: First strokes
PRIMI_TRATTI.description: Validate 10 strokes on the writing canvas.

SCRITTORE_INSTANCABILE.name: Tireless writer
SCRITTORE_INSTANCABILE.description: Validate 50 strokes on the writing canvas.

ESPLORATORE.name: Explorer
ESPLORATORE.description: Unlock 5 kana rows by bringing them to the maximum score.

streak.none: Finish a quiz today to start your streak.
streak.atRisk: Study today so you don't lose it!

heatmap.title: Study activity
heatmap.summary: {{active}} active days · {{xp}} XP in this period

problematic.title: Problem characters
problematic.subtitle: Where you slip up most, by answer or stroke order.
problematic.empty: No problem characters right now. Great job!
problematic.hint: Play a few quizzes to find characters to reinforce.

production.label: Production
production.hint: Recall the kanji from its meaning.

kanjiPlay.selfAssessHint: Did you have it in mind?

requests.title: Teacher applications
requests.subtitle: Approve or reject teacher access requests.
requests.confirmRejectDescription: {{name}}'s application will be rejected and access will remain denied.
requests.emptyDescription: There are no teacher applications for the selected filter.

validation.nomeLength: The classroom name must be between 2 and 120 characters
validation.annoFormato: The school year must be in the format YYYY/YYYY (e.g. 2025/2026)
validation.colore: The colour must be a hex value (e.g. #4F46E5)

list.title: My classrooms
list.subtitle: Create and manage your students’ virtual classrooms.
list.empty: No classrooms found. Create one to get started.

detail.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this classroom? This action cannot be undone.

validation.titoloLength: The title must be between 2 and 160 characters
validation.tempoLimite: The time limit must be between 1 and 1440 minutes
validation.punteggioMassimo: The maximum score must be between 1 and 1000
validation.numeroDomande: The number of questions must be between 1 and 200
validation.punteggio: The score must be between 0 and 1000
validation.tempoImpiegato: The time spent must be between 0 and 86400 seconds
validation.quizRichiesto: Choose the quiz the student must take.
validation.corsoRichiesto: Choose the course the student must follow.

form.numeroDomandeHint: Leave empty to use the quiz's default round size.
form.istruzioniHint: Text shown to the student along with the assignment.

list.title: Assignments
list.subtitle: Create and assign activities to your students.
list.empty: No assignments found. Create one to get started.

detail.noAssignments: No recipients. Assign the task to a classroom or a student.
detail.notSubmittedYet: The student has not submitted yet.

studente.title: My assignments
studente.subtitle: Assigned, due soon, overdue and completed assignments.
studente.submitHint: Mark the assignment as completed, optionally providing a score and time spent.

tipiDescrizione.quiz: The student takes a published quiz from the school.
tipiDescrizione.corso: The student follows a video course.
tipiDescrizione.pratica_scrittura: The student practises guided character writing.
tipiDescrizione.lettura: The student reads the material described in the instructions.
tipiDescrizione.consegna: The student submits work and marks it as completed.
tipiDescrizione.personalizzato: Free-form activity: describe it in the instructions.

validation.titoloLength: The title must be between 2 and 160 characters
validation.capitoloTitoloLength: The chapter title must be between 2 and 160 characters
validation.documentoTitoloLength: The document title must be between 1 and 200 characters
validation.url: The URL must be a valid http(s) address
validation.durata: The duration must be between 0 and 86400 seconds
validation.ordine: The order must be an integer greater than or equal to 0

list.title: Courses
list.subtitle: Create video-lesson courses and make them available to your classrooms.
list.empty: No courses found. Create one to get started.

form.copertinaHint: Optional · http(s) address of an image
form.videoScaricabileHint: Default course policy. Each chapter can override it individually.

detail.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this course and all its chapters?

capitolo.empty: No chapters yet. Add one to get started.
capitolo.deleteConfirm: Delete this chapter and its documents?
capitolo.toggleContenuti: Show or hide the chapter contents
capitolo.deleteSezioneConfirm: Delete this section, its sub-chapters and their documents?

capitoloForm.videoUrlHint: YouTube, Vimeo or a direct link to a video file (http/https)
capitoloForm.ordineHint: Optional · if empty, the chapter goes to the end
capitoloForm.haSottoCapitoli: This chapter has sub-chapters and cannot itself become a sub-chapter.

documento.title: Attached documents
documento.fileHint: PDF, Office, TXT, CSV or ZIP · 100 MB max

disponibilita.title: Availability
disponibilita.empty: The course is not available to any classroom yet.
disponibilita.added: Course made available to the classroom.
disponibilita.removeConfirm: Revoke the course availability for this classroom?

studente.title: My courses
studente.subtitle: On-demand video lessons available for your classrooms.
studente.noCapitoli: This course has no chapters yet.
studente.sezioneVuota: This section has no content yet.
studente.lezioneVuota: This lesson has no content yet.

player.noDownload: Downloading this video is not allowed.

copertina.title: Cover image
copertina.hint: JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF · 10 MB max

video.title: Lesson video
video.hint: MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI or MKV · 1 GB max
video.deleteConfirm: Remove the uploaded video for this chapter?
video.usaUrlEsterno: This chapter uses an external video URL. Uploading a file will take precedence over it.

teacherDashboard.title: Statistics
teacherDashboard.subtitle: Aggregate progress of your students.
teacherDashboard.tempoNota: Actual study time is not tracked: "Avg. study days" is the available estimate.

scuole.managementSubtitle: Create schools, assign slug and status, and delete the ones no longer needed.

list.title: Schools
list.emptyDescription: No school has been created yet. Create one to get started.
list.deleteBlocked: The school has linked users and cannot be deleted.

form.impostazioniHint: JSON object matching the platform schema. For everyday configuration use "School settings".
form.slugHint: Used in ?scuola=… to serve the right branding before login. Leave empty to derive it from the name.
form.slugAnteprima: If left empty this will be used: {{slug}}
form.attivaHint: A suspended school is unreachable for its users.
form.predefinitaHint: Served when no school is specified. Only one may hold this flag.

delete.title: Delete school
delete.description: Do you want to delete the school "{{nome}}"? This action cannot be undone.

select.label: School
select.empty: No schools available — create one first

validation.nomeLength: The name must be between 2 and 160 characters
validation.impostazioniObject: Settings must be a JSON object (key/value pairs)
validation.impostazioniMax: Settings exceed the maximum allowed size
validation.slugLength: The slug must be between 2 and 80 characters
validation.slugFormato: The slug may only contain lowercase letters, digits and hyphens

upload.dropzone: Drag a file here, or click to choose one

errors.dimensione: The file exceeds the maximum size of {{max}} MB.
errors.nessunFile: Select a file to upload first.

list.title: Quiz management
list.subtitle: Your school’s quizzes: installed templates and custom quizzes.

catalogo.title: Available templates
catalogo.subtitle: Install a template to add it to your school’s quizzes. You can install it more than once with different settings.

form.templateHint: A template generates its questions automatically; a custom quiz uses the questions you write.
form.dimensioneRoundHint: From 1 to 50. How many questions each game proposes.
form.mescolaDomandeHint: Every game proposes the questions in random order.

config.title: Configuration
config.subtitle: Settings fixed here cannot be changed by the student; the ones left free stay up to them.
config.righeLibere: No row fixed: the student chooses freely.
config.righeFissate: Only the selected rows will be proposed.

domande.title: Questions
domande.empty: No questions yet: the quiz cannot be played.

domanda.mediaUrlHint: Optional: an http(s) image shown along with the question.
domanda.opzioniHint: Use the selector to mark the single correct option.
domanda.caseSensitiveHint: If enabled, “Rome” and “rome” are different answers.
domanda.spiegazioneHint: Shown to the student in the end-of-game review.

aule.title: Enabled classrooms
aule.empty: The quiz is not enabled for any classroom yet.
aule.removeConfirm: Revoke this quiz for this classroom?
aule.nonPubblicato: The quiz is not published: students will not see it while it stays a draft.

detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this quiz? Questions and enablements will be removed.

validation.titoloLength: The title must be between 2 and 160 characters
validation.dimensioneRound: Questions per round must be between 1 and 50
validation.opzioneTestoMax: The option text cannot exceed 500 characters
validation.opzioniVeroFalso: A true/false question must have exactly 2 options

vocabolario.testoLiberoHint: Free text: your school has not defined a list of values.

profilo.descrizione: Personal data, sessions and preferences. Always on.

aule.descrizione: Virtual classrooms with teachers and students.

quiz.descrizione: Quizzes written by teachers and platform templates.

corsi.descrizione: On-demand video lessons with chapters and materials.

compiti.descrizione: Deadlines, submissions and grading. Requires classrooms.

messaggi.descrizione: Internal messaging between teachers and students.

statistiche.descrizione: Dashboards, trends and activity over time.

gamification.descrizione: Experience points, levels, daily streaks and goals.

praticaScrittura.descrizione: Stroke order and guided writing canvas. Only useful for subjects with handwriting.

impostazioni.title: School settings
impostazioni.subtitle: Identity, appearance, contacts and active sections. Changes apply to everyone in your school.

admin.title: No school assigned
admin.description: The administrator account spans every school and has none of its own. Configure individual schools from "School management".

identita.descrizione: Name, tagline, logo and images shown to users and in link previews.

aspetto.descrizione: Brand colours and default theme. State colours (success, error) stay those of the platform.

indirizzo.descrizione: Physical location of the school. Empty fields are not shown.

social.descrizione: Links to the school's profiles. Leave blank what you do not use.

footer.descrizione: Text and links at the bottom of every page.

didattica.descrizione: Your school’s vocabularies: classes, levels and subjects. An empty list leaves the matching field as free text.

funzionalita.descrizione: Whatever you switch off here disappears from the menu and is refused by the API too.

identita.logoScuroUrl: Used when the dark theme is active. Falls back to the normal logo.

aspetto.temaSelezionabile: When off, the light/dark switch is hidden.

didattica.classiDisponibili: The classes your students can belong to. Leave empty to use a free-text field.
didattica.livelliDisponibili: Levels for classrooms and courses (e.g. A1, Beginner, Year 3). Leave empty to use a free-text field.
didattica.materieDisponibili: The subjects you teach. Leave empty to use a free-text field.
didattica.accessoLiberoTemplate: When on, students may practise quiz templates without an assignment.

footer.testo: A single line shown above the links.

vocabolario.vuoto: No entries: the field will stay free text.
vocabolario.pieno: You reached the maximum of {{max}} entries.

social.altriHint: Any other profile or site: Mastodon, Discord, a blog…

anteprima.descrizione: How the chosen colours will look, in the active theme.
